title: cynorkis elephantina
intro: Cynorkis elephantina is a rare orchid species native to tropical Africa, often referred to as the "Elephant Orchid" due to its large and showy flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with its roots and leaves possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynorkis elephantina include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake and spider bites. Herbal preparations of Cynorkis elephantina are typically made by boiling the roots and leaves in water to create a medicinal tea, which is then consumed to reap its therapeutic benefits.
